item.steamturbine.pearlescent_dew_bucket: A hyper-energetic alchemical fluid that burns at extreme temperatures. Only Steam Boilers have the refractory capacity to contain its heat so most engines would melt down instantly.
Burns at heat level 4.0, exceeding superheated limits. Consumes very slowly. Only compatible with the Steam Boiler and incompatible with other engines and blaze burners.
block.steamturbine.directional_analog_ge: A directional gearshift controlled by analog redstone signals. The LEFT and RIGHT sides determine output speed and direction from their signal differential.
Output speed follows the input direction with an RPM modifier based on the redstone differential. Higher differential = higher speed.
Output direction is locked to an absolute direction determined by which redstone side is stronger. The input direction is completely ignored; only the speed magnitude is used.
Kinetic input must be supplied from the BACK side (Marked Red). The OPPOSITE side (Marked Blue) is the output.
Produces Steam which can be fed to Steam Turbines, Steam Pumps, Steam Compressors, and Pressurized Steam Pipes. Make sure to feed it fuel and water!
block.steamturbine.pressure_pipe.tooltip: Holds Steam from other machines. Use it along with a Pressurized Steam Pump to connect machines together.
block.steamturbine.steam_compressor.tool: Uses rotational force to compress Steam to have higher pressure and throughput. Place it between Steam Boilers/Steam Pumps and Steam Turbines.
block.steamturbine.steam_turbine.tooltip: Consumes Steam to generate power which is sent to the Steam Turbine Shaft. You can chain 10 of these together for higher SU.
block.steamturbine.turbine_shaft.tooltip: Generates SU from chained Steam Turbines.
block.steamturbine.steam_pump.tooltip.su: Pulls steam from all connected Pressurized Steam Pipes into one direction.
block.steamturbine.lava_duct_turbine.too: Generates SU based on how many sides are touching lava. Each side touching lava produces 475 SU. Place below a Lava Duct Shaft and stack multiple turbines up to 5 max.
block.steamturbine.lava_duct_shaft.toolt: Collects SU from Lava Duct Turbines placed below it. Outputs kinetic power and requires continuous water supply to its copper pipe side.
block.steamturbine.network_diagnoser.too: Displays network RPM, SU usage, and allows stress testing. Right-click to configure.
Shows live RPM and stress data from the connected kinetic network when viewed with engineer goggles.
When active, injects configurable stress into the network to test capacity limits.
block.steamturbine.steam_jet_thruster.to: Consumes Steam to produce directed thrust. Connect a compressor along with a pump for increased efficiency and power.
